title: Meet Your Enhanced Fight
body:
[Meet Your Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/meet-your-fight) is an **interesting mod**,however,the textures are not good-looking.

So I made the resouse pack to give it  **better textures**  and  **_more_**.
## Compatibility
- Better Jukebox/Amendment (music discs)
- Xaero's Minimap (icons)
